creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-04-20 21:29:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/ossec-hids-server Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist pkg-plist.client 
    security/ossec-hids-server/files ossec-hids.in 
                                     patch-InstallServer.sh 
                                     patch-LOCATION patch-defs.h 
  Log:
  OSSEC is an Open Source Host-based Intrusion Detection System.
  It performs log analysis, integrity checking, Windows registry
  monitoring, rootkit detection, time-based alerting and active
  response.
  
  WWW: http://www.ossec.net/
  
  PR:             ports/111944
  Submitted by:   Valerio Daelli <valerio.daelli at gmail.com>
